utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am so sorry . Please stop freaking out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not freaking out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Why would I be freaking out ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: A woman named Heldi called and said we were getting married , but that happens everyday .

emotion_cause.span: 4_A woman named Heldi called and said we were getting married , but that happens everyday .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Honey , we were at this beautiful place , and I ... I ... I just put our names down for fun !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I ... I ... I just put our names down for fun !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean , what the harm in that ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Right here !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler , please do not think I was trying to pressure you . Phoebe and Rachel

emotion_cause.span: 8_please do not think I was trying to pressure you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Phoebe and Rachel !

emotion_cause.span: 10_So the people that knew about our wedding before me were you , Phoebe and Rachel , Heldi , and apparently some band called Starlight Magic 7 who are available by the way !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So the people that knew about our wedding before me were you , Phoebe and Rachel , Heldi , and apparently some band called Starlight Magic 7 who are available by the way !

emotion_cause.span: 10_So the people that knew about our wedding before me were you , Phoebe and Rachel , Heldi , and apparently some band called Starlight Magic 7 who are available by the way !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It was a mistake . Please do not take this to mean anything , because it does not .

emotion_cause.span: 11_It was a mistake . Please do not take this to mean anything , because it does not .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Really ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes , if it really does not mean anything , because you know that I am just not ready

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know ! I know .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am gonna go tell Joey that that you are back . I was really worried about you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , did she buy it ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Totally .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So did Heldi show you the place ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , it is beautiful .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I can not believe you are gonna ask Monica to marry you !

emotion_cause.span: 22_you are gonna ask Monica to marry you !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I know .
